entries.content:
# Morning Journal - 2026-03-02

**First thought after waking up:**
Goddamn, I slept like a rock.

**Sleep:**
- Duration: ~8 hours
- Deep sleep: Yes, very deep
- Interruptions: None, don't remember waking up at all
- Dreams: None remembered

**Mental state:**
- Feeling: Decent
- Excited about: Not really excited about much, honestly
- Work has been very stressful

**Energy level:**
6-7 out of 10

**Physical state:**
- Feeling decent overall
- Little sore from working out
- Little shaky from anxiety (work stress)
- Leg is jiggling

**Closing thought:**
Hopefully today is not too bad.

# Morning Journal - March 3rd, 2026

## Questions & Responses

**1. What was your first thought after waking up?**
> "man my mouth is dry and my head hurts", I'm fucking hungover

**2. How was your sleep? (duration, deep sleep, interruptions, dreams)**
> Interrupted, woke up a number of times to drink water

**3. How do you feel mentally? (What am I excited about? What's worrying or saddening me?)**
> Tired, kind of resigned to the day

**4. What's my energy level? (1-10 scale)**
> 2

**5. How do I feel physically? (Any pain? Taste in the mouth? What do you see? What do I hear?)**
> Hungover, headache, nausea, yucky mouth, lethargy

---

*Entry recorded: 2026-03-03T13:07 UTC*

# Evening Journal - March 3rd, 2026

## 1. How did today go?
It went ok, better than yesterday. Going to work in person helped ease some of my anxiety about work, tensions are starting to ease after the disaster of our last big project with an impossible deadline. It also helped learning that a lot of the strictness has been related to a different team's performance. It still sucks to be punished because of what they did, but I'm less concerned about my own quality of work being inadequate.

## 2. Best moment of the day
Bar trivia with Kudo, Rohit, and 2 of his friends. We came in first for the first time, which was nice.

## 3. Hardest moment of the day
Getting out of bed, I was fucking hungover.

## 4. Emotions during the hard moment
- Tired - 10
- Resigned - 6
- Anxious - 4

## 5. How I handled it
I got up and got to work on time. I did my best even though I was foggy and tired and nauseous. It got better over the day.

## 6. What I learned
Drinking heavily on a weeknight is bad lol, but I knew that already.

## 7. Gratitude
- I'm grateful for my partner, who has been an emotional rock for me.
- My friends, for giving me a way to go feel like a normal person, out doing normal things.
- My financial situation, for making my life possible, and giving me a safety net.

## 8. Tomorrow preview
Not being hungover

## 9. One thing I'm worried about
The continued developments of stuff at work.

# Morning Journal - March 4, 2026

**Time:** 1:00 PM UTC (7:00 AM local)

## Answers

1. **First thought after waking up:** "Fuck, I don't think I fell back asleep after waking up at 5"

2. **Sleep:** Deep, no dreams. Woke up at around 5 and had a little bedroom fun with my partner, not sure I got any more sleep afterwards

3. **Mental state:** Feel pretty ready, the fog from yesterday is going. Work anxiety is less, but not sure what I'm going to be working on today.

4. **Energy level:** 6/10 - still a bit tired but mentally sharp

5. **Physical state:** A bit sore, hungry. The sun comes up too early now. Woke up really thirsty again.

# Evening Journal - March 4, 2026

**Time:** 1:00 AM UTC (7:00 PM local)

## Answers

1. **How did today go?**
Stressful, but productive. Spent a long time in meetings hashing out a new strategy for project management, and new processes to document and track work. I had to hound people a bunch in order to make sure a change log went out on time, and stay 45 minutes late in a "quick 10 minute" meeting. That was stressful, but less stressful than missing another update window.

2. **Best moment of the day**
Waking up INCREDIBLY horny at 5am and having some good sex

3. **Hardest moment of the day**
The last 45 minutes, in a meeting with our CEO watching her make pointless edits to the change log while my partner was waiting for me to pick them up from work.

4. **Emotions during the hard moment (list + intensity 1-10)**
Stress 7
Irritation 6
Anxiety 4

5. **How I handled it**
I stuck it out, and made fucking sure that change log went out today. Tried to listen more than I spoke.

6. **What I learned**
I need to start taking more initiative at work to make people get shit done. And I need to be better about listening fully before replying

7. **Gratitude: Three things I'm grateful for today**
My partner again for being incredibly patient and understanding
Corbin, for getting my ass in gear to be better about keeping up relationships with friends
That paying a speeding ticket is only a minor inconvenience instead of a huge financial blow

8. **Tomorrow preview: One thing I'm looking forward to**
Dinner with keii! And giving him his very late Christmas gift.

9. **One thing I'm worried about**
I didn't work out yesterday, today, and probably won't have time tomorrow.

# Morning Journal - March 5, 2026

## 1. First thought after waking up
I was surprised at how well rested I was, and that I was ready/wanting to have sex again after the 'explosive' session last night ;)

## 2. Sleep
Good, no dreams and no interruptions.

## 3. Mental state
A bit tired, but ready to face the day. Excited by the prospect of sending a lewd picture to Corbin, but not sure if my partner will be ok with that, need to check in first. Anxious about the process at work, but I'm hopeful it'll be better than what we were doing before.

## 4. Energy level
6

## 5. Physical state
No serious pain, knees are still feeling funky. Blackout curtains are doing their job, but making it really hard to get up. The cats are helping remind us though

# Evening Journal - March 5, 2026

## 1. How did today go?
Better, then good. Work is starting to get back to usual. I spent a while just jamming to music and writing code. After work we went out to dinner with friends, then window shopped at Best Buy. It was nice hanging out with them.

## 2. Best moment of the day
Spending time with friends, it was a great reset and mood booster.

## 3. Hardest moment of the day
Having to be around Michael while he bowls over the support team members. The second Michelle and Ryan leave he turns into a power tripping bully, and it sucks to be around and unable to do anything.

## 4. Emotions during the hard moment
- Anger: 7
- Frustration: 7
- Powerlessness: 4

## 5. How I handled it
I briefly corrected him once when he completely mischaracterized an issue a new employee had. It wasn't fun.

## 6. What I learned
I need to keep working on listening more than I talk, and wait for people to finish talking before I respond.

## 7. Gratitude
- My friends Maureen for taking the manager position and helping us get proper project management in place
- Idk I'm bad at gratitude

## 8. Tomorrow preview
Seeing the Andrew Callaghan show! That's going to be fun.

## 9. One thing I'm worried about
The deployment going smoothly, a LOT of stuff is going out and we really need to get it live.

# Morning Journal - March 6, 2026

## Questions & Responses

**1. First thought after waking up?**
> That its not that cold in here even though we had the window open. Finally getting nicer out

**2. Sleep quality?** (duration, deep sleep, interruptions, dreams)
> 8h+, my watch says it was excellent. I feel restored.

**3. Mental state?** (excited about? worrying/saddening?)
> Low emotional level overall, but excited for the show tonight and seeing Andy.

**4. Energy level?** (1-10)
> 7 before getting out of bed

**5. Physical state?** (any pain, taste, what do you see/hear?)
> I'm kinda sweaty, but nothing much else

---

*Entry created: 2026-03-06T13:09:00Z*

# Evening Journal - March 6, 2026

## 1. How did today go?
Boring at work - which was good! The big update deployment went smoothly. We (mostly I) cleaned the house after work to prepare for Andy staying the night. Andy came over after work for the channel 5 show, we have chicken pesto paninis which were delicious. Made some character sheets for a ttrpg he's going to run, waiting for the show to start now.

## 2. Best moment of the day?
Hopefully the channel 5 show!

## 3. Hardest moment of the day?
The 15 minutes during the deployment when some infrastructure went down. Thank God it was that and not related to the deployment.

## 4. Emotions during the hard moment (list + intensity 1-10)
- Stress: 3

## 5. How I handled it
I wasn't in the office to overhear the chatter, but I asked my coworker what it sounded like and he said it sounded like not my problem.

## 6. What I learned
I really need to clean the house more, and get Kudo to be better about it.

## 7. Gratitude — three things you're grateful for today
- My friends
- The deployment going smoothly
- That my job allows me to wfh 2 days a week

## 8. Tomorrow preview — one thing you're looking forward to
Hopefully doing some lead climbing with Andy!

## 9. One thing you're worried about
My knee is still achy, it's been like that for a while now...

---

*Entry recorded: 2026-03-07T02:03 UTC*

# Morning Journal - 2026-03-07

1. **What was your first thought after waking up?**
   That I was surprised I woke up so early.

2. **How was your sleep?**
   Not super long, but decent quality. No dreams that I remember.

3. **How do you feel mentally?**
   Chill. Body dysmorphia not great. Looking forward to doing stuff today bringing my mood up from neutral to good.

4. **Energy level:** 5/10

5. **How do I feel physically?**
   The hint of a headache, the sounds of birds outside. Kudo picking up the switch after I said just 2 minutes...

# Evening Journal - 2026-03-07

1. **How did today go?**
   Very good! Hung out with friends a lot. Got breakfast with Andy after the channel 5 show last night, then went rock climbing with him, Kudo and Jasper. After that, we played board games for a bit, then meet Noah and Mal for sushi. It was fucking yummy.

2. **Best moment of the day**
   Climbing! Getting to climb with friends who are stoked is so fun.

3. **Hardest moment of the day**
   Had a bit of really bad body image issues this morning when my partner was initiating sex.

4. **Emotions during the hard moment**
   - Shame: 7
   - Disgust: 4
   - Fear: 2

5. **How I handled it**
   I closed my eyes so I didn't have to look at myself, and focused on sensations until we moved to a different position where I didn't have to see myself.

6. **What I learned**
   Not sure. Spending time with friends is fun I guess.

7. **Gratitude:**
   - My friends so much. I wish we could hang out more
   - My physical health, so I can do fun stuff like climbing
   - My partner, for liking my body even when I don't

8. **Tomorrow preview: One thing I'm looking forward to**
   It being warm!! We're going to try to go for a bike ride hopefully

9. **One thing I'm worried about**
   Not for tomorrow, but I sometimes feel like I annoy my friends. Probably just me being self conscious, but IDK.

# Morning Journal - March 8, 2026

1. **First thought after waking up:** It's so sunny outside
2. **Sleep quality:** Good, woke up a bit earlier because of daylight savings
3. **Mental state:** Excited about it being warm out today, looking forward to a nice relaxing Sunday
4. **Energy level:** 7/10
5. **Physical state:** Feeling pretty good today

My first thought after waking up was 'wow, it feels early and dark out', which makes sense 'cause it was daylight savings yesterday. I didn't sleep for as long as I wanted. It was like 7 hours 20 something based on my watch. Could have been deeper. Not really any interruptions or dreams but still feeling a little tired. Mentally, it was a good weekend but now it's back to work so we're just back to the grind, you know, kind of the usual. Energy levels are five. I'm still pretty tired. Daylight savings getting me. But not too bad. Oh, sore from the bike ride yesterday, but that's normal, you know, acceptable soreness. I took like 10 minutes to get out of bed. Hopefully, adjusting to the time change goes just keeps going better.
